mapper.select: select room_id, winner_user_id, final_price, status, winner_funds_settled, deposits_released, attempt_count, last_error, created_at, updated_at, settled_at from auction_settlement_log where room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: insert into auction_settlement_log ( room_id, winner_user_id, final_price, status, winner_funds_settled, deposits_released, attempt_count, last_error, created_at, updated_at, settled_at ) values ( #{roomId}, #{winnerUserId}, #{finalPrice}, #{status}, #{winnerFundsSettled}, #{depositsReleased}, #{attemptCount}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{settledAt} )
mapper.update: update auction_settlement_log set status = 'PROCESSING', winner_user_id = #{winnerUserId}, final_price = #{finalPrice}, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, last_error = null, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where room_id = #{roomId} and ( status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') or (status = 'PROCESSING' and updated_at < #{staleBefore}) )
mapper.select: select room_id, winner_user_id, final_price, status, winner_funds_settled, deposits_released, attempt_count, last_error, created_at, updated_at, settled_at from auction_settlement_log where status in ('FAILED', 'PENDING') or (status = 'PROCESSING' and updated_at < #{staleBefore}) order by updated_at asc limit #{limit}
